description: Create a workbook in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset. Include a table visualization with 'Product Name' and 'Sales'. Configure a 'Search Product' URL Navigation data action anchored to 'Product Name' that uses the URL https://www.google.com/search?q={Product Name} to pass the product name as a query parameter. Save the workbook as 'Product_Search_Tool' to your Documents folder.
